cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between which times Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. The question gives me several alibis from different people at different times. Betty saw her buying a bike at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. So she's at the bike shop from 1 to 2 pm. 5. Sarah saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. So she's at the electronics store for five hours, from 2 pm until 9 pm. 6. Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. So she's heading towards the statue during that hour. So there's no gap between those. Then after electronics store (9pm) she's walking to the statue until 10pm. So the only time when Jennifer is not seen doing anything is between 8am and 12pm. Wait, but the library is from 12pm to 1pm. So between 8am and 12pm, she's free. So the only possible time she could have gone to the pool is between 8am and 12pm.
